title: Add Automated Coverage For Guardrail Loading And Role Violations
description: Add tests covering template-backed prompt generation, missing-template failure, persisted guardrail context visibility, and blocked role-scope handling for at least two built-in agent types.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify worker prompt generation includes structured guardrails for at least two agent types.
Tests cover runtime template loading and clear failure behavior when a required template file is missing.
Tests cover blocked role-violation handling, including outcome='blocked', block_reason, and next_agent propagation.
Tests verify bead inspection data preserves enough guardrail context to understand which template was applied.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated [tests/test_orchestrator.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/worktrees/B0002/tests/test_orchestrator.py#L433) with a tester-specific blocked role-violation test that asserts `outcome="blocked"`, `block_reason`, `next_agent`, and persisted tester guardrail metadata. Added a CLI inspection test at [tests/test_orchestrator.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/worktrees/B0002/tests/test_orchestrator.py#L466) to verify `bead show` exposes guardrail template context, worker prompt context, and the `guardrails_applied` execution event. Re-ran the relevant prompt-generation, missing-template, guardrail-persistence, and blocked-handoff tests with `PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest -q ...`; 7 targeted tests passed.
handoff_summary.remaining: If you want full regression confidence, investigate why `PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest -q tests.test_orchestrator` did not complete within a 20 second timeout. The focused guardrail coverage passed, but the entire file was not verified end-to-end in this turn.
handoff_summary.risks: `tests/test_orchestrator.py` was already evolving alongside B0003/B0004 work, so downstream agents should expect nearby test churn and rebase carefully. Full-suite runtime remains an open verification gap until the timeout is explained.
handoff_summary.next_action: Run the full unittest target without a short timeout, or isolate the slow/hanging test case before merge.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: High chance of merge overlap in [tests/test_orchestrator.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/worktrees/B0002/tests/test_orchestrator.py) because related guardrail tests were already being added nearby by upstream dependency work.
